Compliance.description: PPRA registered, Fidelity Fund Certificates, Level 2 BEE; no fines/complaints found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Poor HelloPeter rating 1.67/5 (6 recent reviews), mostly 1-star on service issues; some positive testimonials on social.

Product Value.description: Standard real estate services; pricing aligns with industry; wide property range via branches.

Innovation.description: Agent-focused tools (dashboard, auto follow-up SMS/email/WhatsApp, reports); no public app or advanced tenant features.

Customer Support.description: Branch phones only, no central support/email/hotline/hours; reviews cite poor agent response.

Accessibility & Security.description: Limited digital accessibility info; no POPIA policy visible on site, no app security details; relies on branch phones, basic website.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Letting mgmt 8-12% monthly rent + VAT (industry std); rentals R10k-R50k/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Facebook positive testimonials; HelloPeter negative; no X data.
